mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales indicates resilient household demand and near-term earnings support; higher RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth produces nonpositive average 20-day S&P 500 returns or Rank IC below 0.03 in rolling walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.0% after a low-rate period, the discount-rate shock lowers equity duration values and predicts negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.0% and has risen at least 0.25pp over the prior 3 months
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle from low policy-rate levels
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations deliver positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Low unemployment combined with rising consumer prices signals wage-price pressure and tighter policy expectations; this interaction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 4.5% and CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds 2.5%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE high-CPI signal has no more negative 20-day return distribution than either single-series signal alone.

mechanism_narrative: Improving industrial production reflects stronger real output and operating leverage for cyclicals; positive INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 3-month growth above 0.5% is followed by below-baseline 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment indicates weakening labor income and recession risk; an increase in UNRATE predicts negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3pp over 3 months or PAYEMS 3-month average change falls below 75000
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor deterioration periods produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts signal weaker residential investment and future consumer durables demand; a sharp HOUST contraction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST contractions below -10% do not precede lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP expansion reinforced by payroll growth indicates broad demand strength and earnings durability; joint GDPC1 and PAYEMS acceleration predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth exceeds 2% and PAYEMS 3-month average change exceeds 150000
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDP-payroll acceleration signal fails to outperform the unconditional 60-day S&P 500 return by at least 1 percentage point on average.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI acceleration creates short-horizon inflation surprise risk and higher expected real discount rates; rapid CPIAUCSL growth predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 1-month growth crosses above 0.3% while FEDFUNDS is below 2.0%
regime_hint: early tightening phase with inflation acceleration
failure_condition: Reject if CPI acceleration triggers are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or no negative event-window alpha.
